title: verbascum australe
intro: Verbascum australe, also known as the Southern Mullein, is a biennial flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Verbascum australe include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve sleep quality. Verbascum australe can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, or used topically in creams and salves for skin issues.
